name: Fan Poll
description: Interactive poll graphic to drive fan engagement. Poses a question with visual options for fans to vote on in comments or reactions.

question.example: Who was our best signing this season?

voting_instructions.example: Like for A, Comment for B

guidelines: Split-screen design with Option A on the left and Option B on the right, separated by a VS divider. Question text at the top in bold. Each option should have a player photo or relevant image. Voting instructions must be clear. Blue tint on left option, lighter accent on right. Drives comments and engagement metrics.
